name: openbrowser
description: Headless browser for AI agents - semantic tree output, page interaction, site mapping
author: Chris Engelhard <chris@chrisengelhard.nl>

references.title: Installation
references.description: Build from source, system dependencies, Arch Linux extras, Docker, troubleshooting

references.title: CLI Reference
references.description: All subcommands, flags, output formats, and usage examples

references.title: Testing Patterns
references.description: Playwright to open-browser translation table, assertion recipes, workflow templates

references.title: REPL and CDP Server
references.description: Interactive REPL commands, CDP WebSocket server, when to use each

references.title: Knowledge Graph
references.description: Site mapping, BFS crawl, state fingerprinting, transition types, coverage testing

references.title: Semantic Roles
references.description: HTML element to ARIA role mapping, action types, element ID system

references.title: Programmatic Usage
references.description: Rust API, Browser type, navigation, interaction, tab management

references.title: Examples
references.description: End-to-end examples: navigation, forms, REPL, CDP, PDF, smoke tests, SEO audit

references.title: Troubleshooting
references.description: Build issues, runtime errors, element IDs, form submission, JS execution, performance
